highlights.amdocs: Senior Full Stack Developer & System Designer at Amdocs (since 2010) — 15+ years designing and building large-scale backend and frontend systems, with an eye for scalability and usability.
highlights.harmony: Co-created Harmony 2.0 at the Amdocs Experience & Digital Engineering Studio — an npx CLI that scaffolds production-ready React/Redux apps with zero config.
highlights.sideProducts: Ships full products end-to-end, solo — Android TV, PWAs, and SaaS — plus open-source developer tools published on GitHub and npm.

home.tagline: Senior Full Stack Engineer & System Designer

home.expertiseDesc: Senior Full Stack Developer & System Designer at Amdocs, leading complex backend and frontend efforts with an eye for scalability and usability.

home.openSourceDesc: Developer tools that multiply productivity — CLIs, MCP servers, and Chrome / VS Code extensions, published on GitHub and npm.

about.title: About
about.heading: Who I am
about.bio1: I'm a Senior Full Stack Developer & System Designer at Amdocs, where I've spent 15+ years leading complex backend and frontend efforts with an eye for scalability and usability.
about.bio2: I'm passionate about understanding how things work under the hood and finding fast, elegant solutions to hard problems — then turning them into tools that multiply other people's productivity.
about.bio3: I also ship full products end-to-end on my own, from architecture and system design to a polished, offline-first, multilingual UI.

skills.title: Skills & tech stack
skills.subtitle: Grouped by domain
skills.backendItems: Java, Spring, RESTful APIs, EJB, Node.js
skills.frontendItems: React, Redux, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, ES6, TailwindCSS (also Knockout, Backbone, RactiveJS)
skills.toolingItems: Vite, Redux Toolkit, WebSockets, i18n, system design, reusable component libraries, CLI tooling, MCP servers, Chrome MV3 & VS Code/Cursor extensions

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.subtitle: Selected work
portfolio.galleryAutoPlay: Screenshots rotate automatically. Hover or focus to pause.

ateretYosef.name: Ateret Yosef — Digital Synagogue Board
ateretYosef.problem: Synagogues need an accurate, always-on display for daily prayer times, plus simple tools for the gabbai and worshippers.
ateretYosef.solution: A free, full-stack digital-signage platform built end-to-end: an Android TV display, a gabbai management app, and a worshipper view — with a location-precise astronomical engine for daily zmanim, multiple prayer rites, 3 calendars, 17 Haftarah lists, and real-time Home Front Command 'Red Alert' integration.
ateretYosef.outcome: Live, offline-first, and 100% free — a non-profit running on synagogue displays.

cursorChatBridge.name: cursor-chat-bridge — Drive Cursor from your phone
cursorChatBridge.problem: Kick off a task in Cursor, step away, and the AI agent stalls the moment it needs a decision — you're chained to the laptop.
cursorChatBridge.solution: A local daemon plus MCP tools and hooks that turn any chat app (Telegram, Discord, or GitHub Issues) into a remote control for the Cursor agent: it posts a summary and a question at the end of every turn, waits for your reply, and auto-resumes — with per-session isolation, image and voice-note support, and pluggable transport adapters.
cursorChatBridge.outcome: Open source (MIT) on GitHub and published to npm — keep shipping from your phone.

devToolsHub.name: DevToolsHub — Developer Tools Directory
devToolsHub.problem: Great developer tools, extensions, MCPs, rules, and skills are scattered and hard to discover.
devToolsHub.solution: A directory platform to browse by type, submit, and review developer tools — with authentication, filtering, and ratings.

harmony2.name: Harmony 2.0 — React/Redux Boilerplate & CLI
harmony2.problem: Teams waste time wiring up the same production-ready React/Redux setup for every new app.
harmony2.solution: An npx CLI that scaffolds production-ready React/Redux apps (SPA/MPA) with zero config. Co-created at the Amdocs Experience & Digital Engineering Studio.
harmony2.outcome: Open source on GitHub, with a documentation site and an npm package.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.seoDescription: Privacy policy for Yehuda Huri's personal website — what data is collected and your rights.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.body:
This privacy policy explains what information is collected when you use the personal website of Yehuda Huri — Senior Full Stack Engineer & System Designer — and how it is used.

By using this site, you agree to this policy.

voluntary.title: Getting in touch
voluntary.body: This site does not include a contact form and does not collect personal information you submit through it. To get in touch, use the social profile links (LinkedIn, GitHub, npm) or email udah10@gmail.com — any message you send that way is used solely to respond to you.

local.title: Information stored on your device
local.body: The site stores preferences locally in your browser (localStorage): theme (dark/light), design style, and language (English/Hebrew). This data stays on your device and is not transmitted to any server.

thirdParty.title: Third-party services
thirdParty.body:
Google Fonts (fonts.googleapis.com) — your browser loads fonts from Google, which may receive your IP address and browser information.

These providers have their own privacy policies. Data may be processed outside Israel.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.body: This site does not set marketing or analytics cookies by default. Preferences use browser localStorage. If analytics is enabled later (e.g. Cloudflare Web Analytics), this policy will be updated.

security.title: Security
security.body: The site is served over HTTPS. No payment or highly sensitive personal data is collected through this site.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body:
Under the Israeli Privacy Protection Law (1981), you may request access to, correction of, or deletion of personal data held about you, or ask to stop marketing communications.

Contact: udah10@gmail.com

services.title: Third-party links
services.body: Portfolio and social links may take you to external sites (GitHub, LinkedIn, npm, etc.) with their own privacy practices.

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: This policy may be updated from time to time. The latest version will always be available on this page with the update date above.

accessibility.title: Accessibility Statement
accessibility.seoDescription: Accessibility commitment and adjustments for Yehuda Huri's personal website.

commitment.title: Commitment
commitment.body: Yehuda Huri is committed to making this website accessible to all users, including people with disabilities.

compliance.title: Compliance
compliance.body: This site aims to comply with WCAG 2.1 Level AA and the Israeli Standard 5568 for web accessibility.

features.title: Adjustments made
features.body:
Semantic HTML and heading hierarchy
Keyboard navigation support
Sufficient color contrast and dark/light themes
Responsive layout for mobile and desktop
RTL support for Hebrew
Skip-to-main-content link
ARIA labels on key controls
Alt text on portfolio images

thirdParty.title: Third-party content
thirdParty.body: Some third-party components (e.g. Google Fonts) may have accessibility limitations outside our control.

exclusions.title: Known limitations
exclusions.body: Despite our efforts, some areas may not yet be fully accessible. We continue to improve the site.

contact.title: Report an issue
contact.body: If you encounter an accessibility barrier, contact udah10@gmail.com with a description of the problem, the page URL, browser, and assistive technology used if applicable.
